## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:lib` succeeds
- [ ] Storybook story added/updated for any component change
- [ ] Works in both light and dark mode
- [ ] Accessibility considered (roles, ARIA, keyboard, focus)
